import numpy as np
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from sklearn.datasets import make_classification
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler

# ── สร้าง Dataset จำลอง (Binary Classification) ──
np.random.seed(42)
X, y = make_classification(
    n_samples=1000,
    n_features=10,
    n_informative=6,
    n_redundant=2,
    n_classes=2,
    random_state=42
)

print("=" * 45)
print("  📊  DATASET OVERVIEW")
print("=" * 45)
print(f"  Total samples  : {X.shape[0]:,}")
print(f"  Features       : {X.shape[1]}")
print(f"  Class 0 (neg)  : {(y == 0).sum():,} samples")
print(f"  Class 1 (pos)  : {(y == 1).sum():,} samples")
print("=" * 45)
title: 📦 Import Libraries & Generate Dataset
